name: Tom Yam Goong (Thai Hot & Sour Soup)
recipeIngredient: 2 Stalks lemon grass, cut into 1½-inch lengths
4 Kaffir lime leaves, each torn off center spine
6 small Thai chiles – OR – 2 Serrano chiles, sliced lengthwise
1/2 lb Medium shrimp, peeled and deveined, tails left on
1 small Firm tomato, cut into wedges
recipeInstructions: Place water in a 3-quart saucepan. Add lemon grass, lime leaves, and shallot; bring to boil. Add chiles and shrimp; cook 2 minutes. Add straw mushrooms, lime juice, fish sauce, and salt; cook until heated through, but not soft. Strain soup into serving bowl (discard lemon grass and lime leaves). Top with pak chee farang and cilantro leaves.
